name: Crossbow
note: Off-Meta MW2 Crossbow (1 Round, 48 RPM). Weapon-unique Slots = ARMS/BOLT/WIRE. BARREL/AMMUNITION/MAGAZINE zeigen generischen MW-6.8-Pool (TGD-Modell, universal).

ARMS: Thunder 200 Lb :: -50% Gun Kick | -50% Horiz. Recoil | -50% Vert. Recoil | -8% Move | -8% Crouch | -8% Sprint | -9% ADS Move | +6% ADS Time
Carbon Elite v3 :: +100% Gun Kick | +60% Horiz. Recoil | +60% Vert. Recoil | +8% Move | +6% Crouch | +4% Sprint | +12% ADS Move | -9% ADS Time
SO Momenti :: +38.5% Range | +21% Bullet Velocity | +15% Max Hipfire | +9% ADS Time
Quill XE 100 Lb :: -10% Range | -11% Bullet Velocity | -7% Idle Sway | -16% Max Hipfire | -15% ADS Time
WIRE: 28-Strand Cable :: +16% Bullet Velocity | +15% Horiz. Recoil | +15% Vert. Recoil
16-Strand Cable :: -8% Bullet Velocity | -30% Gun Kick | -30% Horiz. Recoil | -30% Vert. Recoil
